messages.content: List the files in this directory

<thought>
I need to view the files in the current working directory to understand the project structure.
</thought>

</tool_call>

<thought>

<tool_call>
{"tool": "run_command", "args": {"CommandLine": "ps aux | head -20", "Cwd": "/Users/rukhvinder/.gemini/antigravity/scratch/mlx_agent", "WaitMsBeforeAsync": 2000}}

What's my IP address?

<thought>
I will run ifconfig to find local IP addresses.

<tool_call>
{"tool": "run_command", "args": {"CommandLine": "ifconfig | grep inet", "Cwd": "/Users/rukhvinder/.gemini/antigravity/scratch/mlx_agent", "WaitMsBeforeAsync": 2000}}
</tool_call>
Install requests library

<thought>
I will run pip3 install requests to install the library.
</thought>
<tool_call>
{"tool": "run_command", "args": {"CommandLine": "pip3 install requests", "Cwd": "/Users/rukhvinder/.gemini/antigravity/scratch/mlx_agent", "WaitMsBeforeAsync": 5000}}
</tool_call>
Run the test suite

<thought>
I will invoke pytest to execute the test files in tests folder.
</thought>
<tool_call>
{"tool": "run_command", "args": {"CommandLine": "python3 -m pytest tests/", "Cwd": "/Users/rukhvinder/.gemini/antigravity/scratch/mlx_agent", "WaitMsBeforeAsync": 5000}}
</tool_call>
Create a new directory called my_project

<thought>
I will use mkdir -p to create the new project subdirectory under user_projects.
</thought>
<tool_call>
{"tool": "run_command", "args": {"CommandLine": "mkdir -p user_projects/my_project", "Cwd": "/Users/rukhvinder/.gemini/antigravity/scratch/mlx_agent", "WaitMsBeforeAsync": 2000}}
</tool_call>
Show git log

<thought>
I will execute git log to display recent commits.
</thought>
<tool_call>
{"tool": "run_command", "args": {"CommandLine": "git log --oneline -10", "Cwd": "/Users/rukhvinder/.gemini/antigravity/scratch/mlx_agent", "WaitMsBeforeAsync": 2000}}
</tool_call>
Check memory usage

<thought>
I will query virtual memory statistics using vm_stat.

<tool_call>

I will print the first few lines of system environment variables using env.

<tool_call>
{"tool": "run_command", "args": {"CommandLine": "env | head -20", "Cwd": "/Users/rukhvinder/.gemini/antigravity/scratch/mlx_agent", "WaitMsBeforeAsync": 2000}}

Kill process on port 8000

<thought>
I will check if there is an active process bound to port 8000 and terminate it to free the port.
</thought>
<tool_call>
{"tool": "run_command", "args": {"CommandLine": "lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || echo 'No process on port 8000'", "Cwd": "/Users/rukhvinder/.gemini/antigravity/scratch/mlx_agent", "WaitMsBeforeAsync": 2000}}
</tool_call>

<tool_call>

{"tool": "run_command", "args": {"CommandLine": "wc -l backend/agent.py", "Cwd": "/Users/rukhvinder/.gemini/antigravity/scratch/mlx_agent", "WaitMsBeforeAsync": 2000}}
